Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3F40 "CITYFIGHTER-3F40" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "City Fighter.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes to allow the fire button in port 2 to start the game (with the original code you must press S):
1. Patched the JSR $8CD6 instruction at $8EC0 to be JSR $5000 instead 2. Added a small routine at $5000 which first executes the JSR $8CD6 instruction to maintain the original code flow. It then checks the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets $C5 to $0D and returns, which causes the game to start just as if S was pressed.
